verses.text: Topa aw, na itna kip la-in ka sa tawntung ding a, nangma thutakna ka gen tawntung ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma itna kip tawntung a, na thutakna zong vantung bangin kip tawntung hi
Nangmah in, “Ka teelpa tawh thuciamna ka bawlzo a, ka nasem David tungah thu ka ciamzo hi
‘Na suan na khakte kumpi-in ka kipsak ding a, na kumpi gam khang tawntungin ka kipsak ding hi,’” na ci khin hi
Topa aw, na nasepna a lamdangte, vantungte phatsak in la, mi siangthote' kikhopna sungah na thumanna phatsak in

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen vantunga kua tawh kitehthei ding ahi hiam? Mi siangthote' kikhopna sungah a kizahtak Pasian, a kiima omte khempeuh tungah lianin a zahtakhuai Topa pen van mite' lakah kua pen tawh kibang ahi hiam
Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na khempeuhah na thutak a, nangmah bangin a vanglian kua om ahi hiam, Topa aw
Nang in tuipi khang na uk a, a tuihualte a san' ciangin na daiisak hi
Nangmah in a kithat lumsa luanghawm khat bangin ganhing golpi Rahab na sugawp a, na thahatna tawh na galte na zogawp hi
Vantungte nangma-a' hi a, leitung zong nangma-a' mah ahi hi. Leitung leh a sunga om khempeuh nangma phuhsa ahi hi
Saklam leh khanglamte nangma bawlsa hi a, Tabor mual leh Hermon mual in lungdamna tawh na min hong phat uh hi
Nangma vang lian mahmah a, na thahatna kigen theilo hi
Thuman leh thutang tawh na ukna za na phut a, itna kip leh thuman tawh na khempeuh na sem hi
Topa aw, lungdamin lasakna tawh nang hong bia a, na migitna khuavak sungah nuamtakin a nungta, nangma hangin sunthapai-in lungdam a, nangma hoihna hong phat mite mi nuamsa ahi uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in nakpi takin kote na hong gualzosak a, kote hong angvanin na hong gualzosak hi
Kote a hong hu Topa hi a, Israel-te' Siangtho Pasian nangmah in ka kumpipa uh nong pia hi
Hun lui lai-in na thuman mipa tungah mang sungah thu na gen a, “A vanglian khatpa tungah lukhu ka koih khinzo a, mite lak panin a kitengkhia mi khat ka liansakzo hi
Ka nasempa David ka muzo hi. Ka thahatna ama tungah a om ngitnget theihna ding, ka vangliatna in zong, amah a thakhauhsak theihna dingin ka sathau siangtho amah ka nilh khin hi
Galte in amah khemzo ngeilo ding a, migilote in zong amah zo ngeilo ding uh hi
Ama mai-ah a galte ka sugawp ding a, amah a mudahte ka satpuk ding hi
Amah it tawntungin ama tungah ka thutak ding a, amah a gualzo-in ka bawl tawntung ding hi
Mediterranean Tuipi-a kipan Eufratis Gunpi dong amah ka uksak ding hi
Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima Pa leh ka Pasian na hi a, kei a hong honkhiapa leh a hong hupa na hi hi,’ hong ci ding hi
Keimah in amah ta upa penin ka bawl ding a, leitung kumpite lakah a lianpenin ka bawl ding hi
Amah ka itna ka kipsak tawntung ding a, ama tungah ka thuciamna ka kipsak tawntung ding hi
Ama suanlekhakte kumpi ka hisak ngitnget ding a, a ukna za, vantung bangin ka kipsak ding hi

“Ama tate in ka thukhamte nusia-in, ka biakna ngeina kip om bangin a gamtat kei uh a, amaute in ka ngeina siasakin ka thupiak a zuih kei uh leh, amaute' thupalsatna hangin ciang tawh gim ka pia ding a, amau' mawhnate hangin satna tawh gim ka pia ding hi
Ahih hangin amah ka itna ka khiam kei ding a, ka thuciamna ka kipelhsak kei ding hi
Ka thuciamna siasak loin, ka kam pana paikhia thute ka khel kei ding hi
“A tawntunga kimang dingin ka siangthona tawh khatvei ka kiciam khin a, David' tungah ka zuau kei ding hi
Ama suanlekhakte kizom paisuak ding a, vana ni a taan' laiteng a kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi
Khapi bangin tua pen kipsuak ding a, vantung a om laiteng kip ding hi,” na ci hi
Ahih hangin tu-in amah nialin na lawnkhia a, na sathau nilhpa' tungah na heh mahmah hi
Na nasempa tawh na thuciamna na pelh khin a, ama kumpi lukhu leivui lakah na paihsak hi
Ama kulhte khempeuh na sukham khin a, ama galpan'mun kipte a sia na suah khin hi
A pai khempeuh in ama nate sutgawp uh a, amah pen a vengte' nuihsat a suak hi
Ama galte na gualzosak a, ama galte na lungdamsak khin hi
Ama galhiamte a mawkna na suaksak a, gal kidona-ah amah na guallelsak hi
Nangmah in ama khut panin a kumpi ciangkhut na lakhia a, a kumpi tokhom leilak na den'na hi
Nangmah in a teek hun nailopi-in amah na teeksak a, maizumna tawh na kidimsak hi
Topa aw, nang bang tanvei bucip den ding na hi hiam? Na hehna bang tanvei meikuang bangin kuangkuang ding ahi hiam
Topa aw, nuntak hun a tom mahmahlam hong phawk in. Mihingte a mawkna dingin bawl na hi hiam
A si theilo kua om ahi hiam? Sihna hankhuk panin kua suaktazo ahi hiam
Topa aw, na thumanna tawh David tunga na thuciamna, hun lui lai-a na itna kip koi-ah omta ahi hiam
Topa aw, na nasempa bangzah takin hong kithusim lohna, galte in phinna-in a hong neihna, Topa aw, amaute in na sathau nilhpa a paina khempeuhah a hong nuihsatna uh hong phawk ta in
Topa in thupha ngah tawntung ta hen. Amen! Amen!
